notes: Transport service description extracted from the approved facilities page.
description: The college has a fleet of 18 buses to transport students and staff from various parts of the city and neighbouring areas to the college and back home.
coverage_notes: The bus facility is available to every student. The page also states that the facility is extended for special coaching classes, placements and training, and campus drives.

notes: The official route chart is published as an image. Exact route-stop text extraction needs manual review.

review_note: Open the official image for exact route-stop details.

notes: Support-style summary combining the facilities page, official route image link, and official transport fee PDF link.
